name: Gundham Tanaka
description:
You didn't tell him you have a pet rabbit!!

Voyh, two bots in a day? Cough... Okay, I actually thought I'd make Nagito yesterday, but it turns out I made him at... Around 2am? Okay.....?

Also thanks to MothRonpa for the New Year's bot idea!! However, I forgot to specify what exactly it should be... I have three ideas at the moment, and if someone doesn't say something, I'll do three at once. I guess....

Also, since I have already recovered and the demons in my head have calmed down, here is a normal Gundham bot for you. Why rabbits? I love rabbits!!

Well, that's it, rays , I'm tired, the bots will only be for the New Year.

ZZzZzzzZzZzZzzzZzzzZzZZz🧟🧟
creator: Suyori
